name: Irisity AB (publ)
summary: Irisity AB (publ) provides camera surveillance solutions. The company offers cameras linked to alarm center to guard various buildings, facilities, and schools. Irisity provides Security as a Service solution IRIS that monitors a wide range of applications for various customers in the Nordic countries and internationally. Its products include construction guard, school guard, area guard, and night-time supervision systems, as well as intelligent parking solutions. In addition, it offers computer vision software consultancy services. The company was formerly known as Mindmancer AB (publ) and changed its name to Irisity AB (publ) in August 2017. Irisity AB (publ) was founded in 2006 and is based in Gothenburg, Sweden.
